title: Moments tiles: heart → round (Instagram-style)
notes: DESIGN: Moments strip tiles are now round Instagram-style circles instead of heart-shaped.
DESIGN: Unread-moment gradient ring + 2px gap between ring and avatar (matches Instagram exactly).
DESIGN: '+ add' badge on your own tile moved to bottom-right of the circle (was offset for the heart's pointy bottom).
Close Friends green-ring variant preserved. The separate chat-reaction heart-emoji lever in messages is unchanged (different feature).
